content.en:
The Lord of Ice Glass was killed, which was a matter of an instant.

Now.

The other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Ice Beast Palace were all stunned, they couldn't believe that the Lord of the Ice Glass had been killed.

The strength of the Lord of Ice Glass after breaking through, they all knew how terrifying it was.

But in Ye Tian's hands, he was killed almost instantly, like an ant.

"Run!"

They have absolutely no idea of fighting.

However, in front of Ye Tian, where could they escape!

Moreover, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Realm of Ancient Heng Mountain also intercepted one after another.

Soon, one of the Ice Beast Palace's Origin Realms was killed.

Not long after, the Ice Beast Palace's Origin Realm was completely wiped out.

As for those ice beasts of the Bone Transformation Realm, Ye Tian didn't make a move to kill them.

If he makes a move, he will be bullying the small.

For the current Gu Heng Mountain, it was only a matter of time before they were killed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here.

After that, whether Gu Heng Mountain destroyed the Ice Beast Palace, or how to deal with it, was all Gu Heng Mountain's business, and it had nothing to do with him.

......

Some time later.

The news that Ye Tian had killed the Lord of Ice Glass of the Ice Beast Palace spread, and all the forces were extremely surprised.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian was just an eight-time bone transformation realm-level genius.

As a result, after such a short period of time, Ye Tian not only became the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, but also easily killed the Lord of Ice Glass.

Of course.

They attributed most of the credit for Ye Tian's strength improvement to Wind Tooth Island, believing that Wind Tooth Island was too strong to make Ye Tian's strength increase so quickly.

It is conceivable that if Fengya Island includes the other side level geniuses next time, a large number of other side level geniuses are estimated to compete for places.

In the following years, Ye Tian cultivated and comprehended the Origin Rules of the other side very calmly, but nothing happened.

One primeval era after another has passed, and the origin rules on the other side of Ye Tian are steadily improving.

Before you know it, 30,000 primeval epochs have passed.

Ye Tian has been comprehending the Origin Rules of the Other Shore in the Eternal Origin Array, and he only knows that his Origin Rules of the Other Shore have improved a lot, and even the Origin of the Other Shore has made great progress, but there is no comparison of how much he has improved.

He only roughly judged that his cultivation should have broken through to the middle realm of the Origin Lower Realm.

But whether it is or not has to be tested.

He walked out of the Eternal Origin Circle and went to the Peer Ruler to test his Origin Rule Realm on the other side.

Airplanes!

A number appeared.

【25】

This means that Ye Tian's other side origin rules have reached the realm of two into five.

The higher the Origin Rule, the more difficult it is to improve, but every time you improve, the progress is huge.

"Very good, two out of five on the other side of the origin rule realm, if it is other other other shore-level geniuses, how many tens of thousands of primeval epochs will have to be spent before there is any hope of ascending!" Ye Tian said with emotion.

Subsequently.

He went to the Origin Monument again to test the extent of his Origin on the other side.

Airplanes!

The Origin Monument shone brightly, and a number appeared.

【1686】

As long as it exceeds a thousand, it is equivalent to reaching the middle stage of the Origin Lower Realm, and he is naturally considered to have reached the middle stage of the Origin Lower Realm now.

If it reaches 3000, it means that it has reached the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm.

However, the span from the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm to the peak of the Origin Lower Realm is very large, and it is necessary to reach the other side of the origin of 10,000 before it can be regarded as reaching the peak of the Origin Lower Realm, and only then can it be qualified to impact the Origin Middle Realm.

Compared to tens of thousands of primeval era ago, his current strength has improved a lot.

Of course.

He couldn't compare with those Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the east, and he was also compared to the Origin Realm geniuses in the middle.

Compared to those really top demon realm-level geniuses on the other side of the Origin Realm, he was still very weak now.

After the test, Ye Tian returned to the Eternal Origin Array to cultivate and comprehend.

This time.

He was going to cultivate until the Eternal Origin Circle was shattered before exiting the level.

However, he hadn't cultivated for long before the Lord of Ice and Rain came looking for him.

Rain Island.

Ye Tian sat in a palace with the Lord of Ice and Rain and some other Origin Rank Heavenly Ancestors.

Then.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said, "Everyone, I have called you here this time to inform you of one thing, that is, the tidal period of the Origin Black River has arrived. For the eastern, western, southern, northern, and central parts of the Eternal Land, these tidal periods have no effect on them. However, it has a great impact on our Fengya Island. "

Tidal times?

Ye Tian was a little stunned when he heard this, and he didn't know what it was.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, what is the time of the tides?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Ice and Rain looked at Ye Tian, knowing that Ye Tiancai had joined Fengya Island, and it was normal not to understand, so he would explain by the way.

"The Origin Black River will give birth to a tidal period every long years, and during the tidal period, the water of the Origin Black River will form a terrifying impact, and under a certain force, a drop of river water can penetrate the body of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm. It can be said that even if he is a genius at the other side of the Origin Lower Realm, staying alone in the Origin Black River is at risk of falling. "

"And every time the tide comes, many of the weak creatures of the Origin Black River will die. Some small forces will also be destroyed if they do not move. "

Hearing this, Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Wind Tooth Island is not going to be moved.

His Eternal Origin Circle can still be used for tens of thousands of primeval eras, if this is moved, his Eternal Origin Circle can't be taken away, then it will be scrapped!

But the Lord of Ice and Rain's next words made him breathe a sigh of relief.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said: "Wind Tooth Island will naturally not move, after all, there are many treasure lands and magic circles on Wind Tooth Island that cannot be easily moved, and if it is moved, the loss will be too great." At the beginning of the tidal period, the wind area outside of our Island will resist a portion of the river's water, so that the raging water will not be able to submerge our Island. Coupled with some magic circles on Wind Tooth Island, there is no problem in surviving the tide period. "

Seeing that the Lord of Ice and Rain said this, Ye Tian was not worried.

But the Lord of Ice and Rain has a meeting, it should be more than just this, otherwise there is no need to have a meeting, just notify them and let them not leave.

Really.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said, "The tidal period of the Origin Black River is both a crisis and an opportunity. During the tidal period, there will be a special substance brought out at the bottom of the original Heihe River, which is called the original black mud, which is indistinguishable from the ordinary river mud of the original Heihe. However, this kind of river mud is very light, but it is very tough, so it is easy to be carried out during tidal times, and it will float on the original black river, which is easy to identify. "~
